task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenToonz application window is open, and the title bar, xsheet, or timeline indicates that 'dwanko_run.tnz' is loaded.

task_completion.description: Apply a drop shadow effect to the character.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FX Schematic or FX Settings window shows a 'Drop Shadow' (or similar shadow) node connected to the character's column/level.

task_completion.description: Offset the shadow to the bottom-right of the character.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Drop Shadow effect settings show positive X and Y offset values (+X, +Y), or the viewer clearly shows the shadow positioned to the bottom-right of the character.

task_completion.description: Ensure the character remains visible on top of the shadow.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenToonz viewer shows the original character rendered clearly in the foreground with the shadow appearing behind it.

task_completion.description: Set the output format to PNG and the destination directory to /home/ga/OpenToonz/output/shadow/.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Output Settings window shows the 'Save In' path set to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/shadow/' and the file format set to 'png'.

task_completion.description: Render the final animation as a PNG sequence.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A rendering progress bar is visible in OpenToonz, or a file manager/terminal window shows at least 5 PNG files generated in the '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/shadow/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenToonz graphical interface to apply the effect and render the scene.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the OpenToonz application menus, FX schematic, and settings windows, rather than just executing a pre-written script in the terminal.

integrity.description: The output files were generated via OpenToonz's render process.
integrity.visual_evidence: The OpenToonz render window or progress bar is shown, rather than files being copied, downloaded, or moved from another location using terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent modified the actual 'dwanko_run.tnz' scene.
integrity.visual_evidence: The OpenToonz viewer displays the actual 'dwanko_run' character and animation frames during the editing process, confirming the correct file was manipulated.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct scene path is '/home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/dwanko_run.tnz'. The output directory must be exactly '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/shadow/'. The shadow must be offset to the bottom-right (+X, +Y). Full points for rendering should be awarded if at least 5 frames are rendered. Solid shadows are acceptable, and strict alpha channel transparency verification is not required.
